label: Thermodynamic Entropy (S)
description: State-function entropy used in classical thermodynamics to quantify reversible heat transfer over temperature.

referent.label: Entropy Measure
referent.description: A quantitative measure of missing constraints, multiplicity, or uncertainty.

label: Boltzmann Entropy (S = k_B ln W)
description: Entropy proportional to the logarithm of the number of compatible microstates.

referent.label: Microstate Count
referent.description: The count of microstates compatible with a macroscopic description.

label: Gibbs Entropy
description: Entropy of a probability distribution over states given by a weighted logarithmic average.

referent.label: Distributional Entropy
referent.description: Entropy defined from a probability distribution over a state space.

label: Shannon Entropy (H = -Σ p log p)
description: Average surprise for a discrete random variable under an encoding model.

referent.label: Uncertainty Measure
referent.description: A quantity that summarizes uncertainty in a random variable or message source.

label: Von Neumann Entropy (S = -Tr(ρ ln ρ))
description: Quantum generalization of entropy computed from the eigenvalues of a density operator.

referent.label: Quantum State Entropy
referent.description: An entropy measure assigned to a quantum state represented by a density matrix.

label: Kolmogorov Complexity
description: Length of the shortest effective description of a string relative to a universal machine.

referent.label: Description Length
referent.description: The shortest code or program length sufficient to specify an object.

label: Second Law of Thermodynamics
description: Principle constraining entropy change and irreversibility in isolated systems.

referent.label: Irreversibility Principle
referent.description: The directional rule governing entropy increase and spontaneous processes.
